title: periphanes gemmata
intro: Periphanes gemmata, also known as the gemmata moth or the gemmata caterpillar, is actually the larva of the Periphanes gemmata moth, a species of moth in the family Sphingidae. The plant I believe you're referring to is actually  Periphanes (Lithosia) gemmata. However, I believe you may be referring to the Lithospermum gemmata is not found.
